facilities.name: McCommas Bluff Landfill
facilities.hours: Dallas lists McCommas Bluff as open Monday through Friday, 5:00 AM to 8:00 PM, and Saturday, 6:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Closed Sunday. Confirm holiday hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Dallas residents in passenger cars, pickups, and trailers under 15 feet hauling waste from their residence can use Dallas landfill and transfer stations at no charge with valid ID and proof of residency. Commercial disposal fees apply to other loads.
not_accepted: Loads that do not meet Dallas disposal rules
facilities.rules: Bring a current valid driver's license and proof of Dallas residency, such as a Dallas address on the license or a current Dallas water bill. Covered-load rules and commercial fee rules still apply.

facilities.name: Northeast (Fair Oaks) Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Dallas lists Fair Oaks as open Monday through Friday, 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM, and Saturday, 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Closed Sunday.
facilities.fees: Dallas residents in qualifying residential vehicles can use city transfer stations at no charge with valid ID and proof of residency.
facilities.rules: Open to Dallas residents only. No commercial customers. Bring a current valid driver's license and proof of Dallas residency before arrival.

facilities.name: Northwest (Bachman) Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Dallas lists Bachman as open Monday through Saturday, 7:00 AM to 4:30 PM. Closed Sunday.
facilities.fees: Dallas residents in qualifying residential vehicles can use the station at no charge with valid ID and proof of residency. Small commercial customers should confirm current pricing before arrival.
facilities.rules: Open to Dallas residents and small commercial customers only. Bring a current valid driver's license and proof of Dallas residency for resident drop-off.

facilities.name: Southwest (Westmoreland) Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Dallas lists Westmoreland as open Monday through Friday, 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM, and Saturday, 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Closed Sunday.
facilities.fees: Dallas residents in qualifying residential vehicles can use city transfer stations at no charge with valid ID and proof of residency.
facilities.rules: Open to Dallas residents only. No commercial customers. Bring a current valid driver's license and proof of Dallas residency before arrival.

facilities.name: Customer Convenience Recycling Center at McCommas Bluff
facilities.hours: Dallas directs residents to McCommas Bluff and the three city transfer stations for electronics recycling during normal residential drop-off hours. Confirm current schedules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Electronics recycling is a resident service. Confirm current item limits and eligibility before arrival.
not_accepted: Business electronics that require separate handling
Items outside Dallas electronics recycling rules
facilities.rules: Dallas residents can drop off electronics at McCommas Bluff or any of the three city transfer stations. Use the city's electronics recycling page for accepted device examples before you drive.

facilities.name: Dallas County Home Chemical Collection Center
facilities.hours: Dallas County lists the home chemical collection center as open Tuesday, 9:00 AM to 7:30 PM; Wednesday and Thursday, 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM; and the second and fourth Saturday, 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
facilities.fees: The center is free for residents of participating cities and unincorporated Dallas County. Residents of non-participating cities should confirm current per-load fees before arrival.
facilities.rules: Bring your driver's license and a current water or utility bill showing an address in a participating city or unincorporated Dallas County. Use the county list to confirm accepted materials, packaging rules, and city eligibility before driving.
